name: Missing Colon
description: Detects missing colons at the end of function or class definitions.
message: Missing colon ':' at the end of the statement.
suggestion: Add a colon ':' at the end of the line to complete the block definition.

name: Mixed Tabs and Spaces
description: Detects mixed usage of tabs and spaces for indentation.
message: Mixed tabs and spaces detected in indentation.
suggestion: Use either only spaces (preferred) or only tabs for indentation throughout the file.

name: Unclosed String Literal
description: Detects string literals that are not properly closed.
suggestion: Ensure all string literals are closed with the matching quote character.

name: Naming Convention Violation
description: Detects function names that do not follow snake_case.
message: Function name uses camelCase. Python standard is snake_case.
suggestion: Rename the function to use snake_case (e.g., 'my_function' instead of 'myFunction').

name: Too Many Parameters
description: Detects functions with more than 5 parameters.
message: Function has too many parameters (more than 5).
suggestion: Consider grouping parameters into a single object or dictionary to improve readability.

name: Missing Docstring
description: Detects functions or classes without docstrings.
suggestion: Add a triple-quoted string immediately after the definition to document its purpose.

name: Empty Except Block
description: Detects except blocks that only contain 'pass'.
suggestion: Avoid catching exceptions without any handling logic. At least log the error.

name: Unused Import
description: Detects imports that are not used in the code.
message: Imported module or name is not used.
suggestion: Remove the unused import to keep the code clean and reduce overhead.
